basic_details.job_title: IIT(ISM) Dhanbad Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology (ISM) Dhanbad (IIT(ISM) Dhanbad) Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT(ISM) Dhanbad Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): Maximum age limit is 32 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per Government of India rules for SC, ST, OBC, PH, and Female candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Tech. in Power Electronics and Drives / Power System Engineering with B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering / Electrical & Electronics Engineering or equivalent. GATE qualified.
qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): M.Tech. in Power Electronics and Drives / Power System Engineering B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering / Electrical & Electronics Engineering or equivalent GATE qualified Strong background in Power Electronics, Machine Modeling, and control with hands-on hardware experience will be given preference.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 37,000/- + 20% HRA initially for one year, extendable to SRF with Rs. 42,000/- + 20% HRA.
salary_details.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): Rs. 37,000/- + 20% HRA (initially for one year) Senior Research Fellow (SRF): Rs. 42,000/- + 20% HRA (extendable subject to satisfactory progress till the end of the project)

selection_process: Shortlisting based on merit and project requirements Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT(ISM) Dhanbad Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
